reviews.review_description: I've had this game in my library for awhile and have only just got round to playing it but now I'm completely hooked. It's a game I played whe  I just want something to relax to and have fun,  I'm fascinated looking into all the little buildings and watching what's going on with the inhabitants going  about their daily routines. I hope one day the devs will revist this game with a DLC because entrancing tho it is, the game makes out at 6 lvls of upgrades and under 30 building units. I feel with a little work this could be made into an excellent city management type game, but I still love it for what it is!

Technically, this game is a masterpiece. The Mixed Reality on Quest 3 is magical, and the tiny people living in your actual walls look incredibly cute. It’s a perfect "showcase" for the headset's capabilities.
However, beneath the beautiful visuals lies a major issue: a lack of depth. The gameplay quickly turns into a repetitive "clicker"—click here, collect coins, play a simple mini-game. It lacks the "soul" and the compelling narrative that games like Townsmen VR or Toy Trains provide.
Without a clear goal or an engaging story, the experience feels hollow. You find yourself collecting resources just for the sake of collecting them. If you’re looking for a real adventure with challenging puzzles, you might get bored quite fast.
It’s great for relaxing and looking at pretty dioramas, but I hope the developers add more meaningful, story-driven content in the future.

Have tried to play this game a few times now, and each time it doesn’t save. Have changed slots, made sure the backup slot chosen etc - still won’t save.
Why play a game that takes time and effort to have to keep starting at the beginning?

developer_response.body:
Dear,

Sorry to hear you are having issues with the title, please note  that the game only starts saving once you complete the first quest, which is finding the Town's mayor, which is like 3 minutes into the game.

Please let us know if you are still encountering the non saves issue and if this is the case please make sure to sent over a bug report via the ingame menu, we can then see your save files and see if there is something hapening there?

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_description: it works, sort of, until you do something else then when you try and play again, it will not place the town right, so you rescan  try and set all the buildings and if it works you can enjoy it that session then next time got to do it again, i don't think they are even trying, you buy it, it works ok gets you past the 2 hour mark, then you find out you got scammed. I guess you got me but you crooks Wont ever get me again.

developer_response.body:
hi Rorad, 

Sorry to hear you are experiencing issues with our title, it is unclear what exactly is going wrong.
Feel free to come over to our Discord so we can give you live support and help you with further troubleshooting your issues. https://discord.gg/wYmnPV4vjq

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_description: This is a wonderful use of VR, I just wish the mini games had a bit more depth, and the villagers would move between different locations in your town.  Fixing these would make this a 5 star experience.
This game is very wholesome, my whole family loves it and my mother can’t stop playing it and she can’t get over how „cute“ it is, in her own words. And I agree.

I have tried to rescan and I can place forrest and lake but as soon as I do it disappears so I cant move on and complete task because lake isnt visble other than this issue the game is amazing just sucks I cant move on because I cant see lake or forest anyway to fix?

developer_response.body:
Hi Wheatster,

So the islands are always being removed as its to hard to keep them on the ground with everything else going on of the game, they always return once you start one of your mini games on them, so this is intended.

So you are not stuck because of the islands disapearing but you probably need to compelte the next step in the story line or colllect more resources. If you think you are still stuck make sure to submit a bug report online and we will take a a look at your save files.

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_description: Sounds fun, but doesn't work. Finishes loading then you just hear music and see nothing.

developer_response.body:
Hi Hack,

sorry to hear you are not being able to get the mgae launched properly.

Can you try deleting your scanned room data on the meta quest and then restarting the game. This often resolves any issues that people have when the game does not launch.

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_description: I just bought this after purchasing a quest 3 and the thing on my wrist is constantly shaking...then the game kept being glitchy and weird?

developer_response.body:
Hi zeenos,

If the watch is shaking it means the tracking has a hard time tracking your hands, make sure to play the room in a well lit room as the Quest 3 cannot track in dimly lit environments. you can also play the game with your controllers which should provide a more stable tracking experience.

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_description: the game never starts. Stuck in loading forever.

developer_response.body:
Hi Pinguino,

Sorry to hear that you are experiencing issues with launching the game. If the game does not load it often is an issue with the room scanning, what should help is deleting all youre scanned room data and then restarting the game.

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_description: This is the best alternative to the Sims that you can play in Mixed Reality.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the kind words!

reviews.review_description: disapointing.  The game has no objective other than upgrading building to level 6 then a few fireworks and THE END.  The Mini games are reheated and not well balanced.  The dating game is useless.  Fun for an hour or so.    PLUS, you can't play sitting down which is is not good news for a super slow ressource management game.
And one of the best Mixed Reality Games

reviews.review_description:
Cute concept, but has a few glitches. You can't install the pond or forest like it asks, and it keeps telling you to open the menu cause there is new buildings. But you can't install and then your stuck playing the game
 It doesn't go anywhere. Very frustrating

developer_response.body:
Hi Joe,

Sorry to hear you are stuck in the game, please hop onto our Discord so we can see where it is exactly that you are stuck and if we can help you out to continue with the game: https://discord.gg/wYmnPV4vjq

reviews.review_description: Game is stuck after the first minute,

developer_response.body:
Hi Spiller,

Sorry to hear you are stuck, can you let us know what is going wrong? Feel free to hop onto our Discord so we can try to help you out!

https://discord.gg/wYmnPV4vjq

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_description: This is the first really good, integrated use of mixed reality I've seen. Prior to this most games simply used MR as a backdrop, with little to no real world interaction so they might as well be VR. But Wall Town is different - it actually uses your room and hands effectively and offers a real step up for MR.  The town and all the minigames in it are simple but fun and take place all over your room, and in this game your real hands actually occlude the virtual elements with correct depth. A first for me.  It's these little touches that make the virtual come to life and I love it.  Hand tracking here is meaningful and a joy to use.  And each building and character is intricately detailed and animated.  Very lovely, cozy little game. Only downside is that I did get some rather distracting jumps and jitters more often than I'd like as the virtual elements 'resettle' in the room.  Even with that, I fully recommend this one, but with a final caution - you will want a good sized room, with some fairly large open wall space to get the most from the game.
The app scans my room, but when I confirm the space, it just sends me back to scan again and keeps looping, even though I scanned correctly. How can I get a refund?

developer_response.body:
Hi Asaam, 

Sorry to hear you are experiencing issues with the app. Can you try to delete all your scanned rooms on the meta headset and then rescan the room? Sometimes the rooms get corrupt and this is the only way to unstuck it.

If you want we can always give you live support on our Discord over here: https://www.meta.com/experiences/6103056399797843/

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_description: will the devs keep adding more things for the people to do? plus will voices ever be added? adding the voices will make this a 5 star game.

i'm not going to lie i really thought this game was pretty awesome a message to the developers add a first person view where you can take control of a character i'd love to be able to fly around the space in one of those blimps as one of these characters

It's alright I just think the quest 3 is struggling to play it. It would be nice if it was a little sharper. This game will be fantastic when a quest 4 comes out with  better pass through. Definitely worth getting, I'm 4 hours in. A lot more to do than I thought.
With the v80 update, the game started working properly, and its awesome

developer_response.body: Hi Deckview, Wonderfull to hear the game finally works on your device, hope you enjoy the playthrough!

reviews.review_description: None of the date location tasks work...city hall date. After hot air ballon took them to date location, everything just cut off. Nothing happen as if did not click on date. Other two date location(painting & bath) after choosing two characters, everything disappeared. Please please fix them....

I usually don’t write reviews. But I have to do for this beautiful game. Very carefully thought and elegantly designed games.
Each buildings are so adorable with game play of their own. It’s a very addictive game wanting you to come back to town and help people as they super giant.
I was feeling so sad that my game ended after level 6 of upgrading every buildings.
I would love if developers could bring overlay of seasons into the town to bring it more lively .
Like release version based on seasons and holidays.
I am ready to pay for this upgrades as well.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the kind words!

reviews.review_description:
Addicted love my little people 4 building upgrades from townhall 7!!! Hope we get some more updates. Couple of bugs bot nothing game braking so this 1 gets 4 stars!
UPDATE Beat the game so sad wish it had a bigger ending and the game was longer!!! We need dlc!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the kind words! <3

reviews.review_description: We have an open-concept home w/ no real wall space so I did struggle a bit at the beginning with the setup, until my husband helped me create fake walls (in front of our couch on one wall and in front of our fireplace on another wall). Now tiny people are walking across my floor and flying into the room in a hot air balloon. I'm helping them build up their town with a restaurant, shop, farm, townhall, workshop, etc. The details are great and the little people interacting is so cute. A very therapeutic game that captivates and sweeps you away from the world's worries. :) LOVE!
The graphics are top notch.  I absolutely love it!!  I took one star off cause for some reason the screen freezes, and I have to reboot to get out of it to start over.  Otherwise I LOVE THE GAME !!!

I've had this game from the very beginning and there's been a couple of updates but nothing substantial.  And now they seem to have given up on updates because nothing has really been fixed and I haven't seen an update in a while.

developer_response.body:
Dear Pyro,

We are still working on the game but we recently focused on the port to other platforms and released this month on Playstation, Steam and Pico. This way we can attract more users and sustatin more content in the future for all these platforms.

So stay tuned and rest assured that we are still working on the title!

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_description: The room isn't recognized. I've tried re-entering the room several times without success. The game can't find my position in the room.

developer_response.body:
Dear,

Sorry to hear you are experiencing issues with scanning the room. Can you try to erase all scanned rooms and also all the cloud stored room data and then try again. Sadly sometimes the room data gets corrupted which then makes the game fail to initialize.

If you keep experiencing issues please hop on our Discord and we can try to give you live support.

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_description:
This game has a few glitches but was overall working okay until about a week in then it suddenly stopped loading any of the town apart from one message that said 'rebuild alchemist' but wouldn't let me do anything. The options button doesn't work, I can't progress past it. Looks like I'm going to have to Uninstall and start from scratch.
It won't bring up a menu or anything, so I am not able to submit a bug report.

developer_response.body:
Dear,

Sorry to hear you are exeperiencing issues with our game. Please submit a bug report via the in game menu so that we receive your save data. This way we can investigate it and see if we can push a fix as soon as posisble.

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_description:
I "completed" this a while ago.

The main game loop consists of you placing buildings inside your home and doing mini games to get resources which can then be used to build and upgrade buildings. Rinse and repeat. Resources also pop up above buildings and you just move your hand over them to collect them. The problem is that quickly you find some mini games give you more resources then others so I found myself just doing the mining mini game and the farming as they seemed to give you the most resources. The farming mini game(s) are pretty good though. Bugs appear in your home you have to shoot and you also have to bounce a dung ball to your home. You also have to water the plants. But that's it, my game time was spent doing the mine, farming and collecting mostly and then using the resources to build more things.

You can't really interact with the people. You can do mini games with them but you can't pick them up individually. The little people have little mocap animations that they loop through within their own buildings that you placed but besides that you can't really do much with them other than watch them.

This game would be absolutely perfect for those who like to play with little train sets with figurines and it's the best city builder atm on quest but if you are looking for another Black and White or something like that this isn't it. Still.a great game though!

developer_response.body:
Hi Jake,

Thanks for the kind words and the feedback.

We are continously adding more content and features to the game so there are more reasons to play but the collecting resources, recently we added a dating feature where you can send your citizens on dates and even let them form couples.

We hope to add a lot more future updates like this so it is not simply about the mini games.

The mine does give a lot of resources but some others like the blimp drop off or the water crossing mini game in the harbor are not that far off.

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_title: One of the best MR games I’ve seen.
reviews.review_description: A truly beautiful and magical game.
It says to pick an origin point where you see a yellow cross. All I get is a yellow dot everywhere, and pinching my fingers together doesn't do anything anywhere.

developer_response.body:
Dear,

Sorry to hear you are having issues with the game.

it sounds like the game is not finding any suitable walls to play the game on. Please try to delete all your existing room scans in the meta menu and then rescan your entire room. This should solve this issue.

Then also make sure there is enough light in your room that you are playing as the room scan needs this to properly work.

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_description: This intrigued me love the way  this is set up as adult it was really surprising and cute and fun

I Had an issue with the spatial data not matching up. Making the game unplayable.
Reached out to devs, they replied quite quickly. Eventually I got a refund for the game. After searching for some more solutions, I re bought the game and got it working. It's such a wonderful game, and I LOVE watching the little people live thier lives! and I HOPE devs keep working on it and updating it.

DEVELOPERS- 

please please make it so that the characters can be interacted with. A Little poke and nudge here and there, a reaction to our pokes. nothing too much. It would just add to the immersion sooo much.

Also, when it comes to the walls, it would be great if you could add a setting where you can make small adjustments to the depth of the wall, because sometimes the buildings just don't sit perfectly against the wall, so a feature where you can pull or push the depth for fine tuning would be amazing.
Love the game!

developer_response.body:
Hi Quantum,

First off thanks so much for updating your review, the reviews means a lot to us developers and it is lovely to see people update them once they see an issue has been resolved!

We are still working on updates for the game one of them is indeed to have a bit more interaction where possible with the characters, it will be quite subtle but in some scenario's you will be able to wave at your characters and they will be waving back at you. :)

Having collisions on all the characters at all times will make the game to heavy, so for now we cannot do it litteraly like that, however once we find more time to look for highly optimized systems we might add something like that later.

We are also looking into more advanced ways to setup the rooms and adjust things like depth, there is no date yet when a feature like that would be coming to live quite yet, but stay tuned on our discord/socials to hear more about that.

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_description:
Love this game, have about 7 buildings so far.
some how the language changed to a foreign one too me.
How do I change it back to English ?

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

You can navigate to the language settings again and then swap it back to English ofcourse its not that handy since you cannot understand the menu options, but feel free to hop onto our Discord and I will show you a video on what buttons to push to swap it back to English.

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_description: I’m not sure what the requirements are for a proper room but apparently my room isn’t it. I completely cleared off my walls and scanned the room and it still won’t even let me begin to play! I was so excited about playing this game, but I was only let down. I’m not sure if I can get my money back or not but I’d really rather be able to play the game!

developer_response.body:
Hi Little Demon,

If you are continously getting an error that your room is not correct it means some of your room data got corrupt.

The only way to solve this is clearing all your scanned rooms and also the cloud saves room data which you can find out how to clear that here: https://www.meta.com/en-gb/help/quest/articles/accounts/privacy-information-and-settings/spatial-data-settings/

If you are still stuck please hop onto our Discord so we can help you out: https://discord.gg/wYmnPV4vjq

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_description: I am obsessed with this game purchased it a few days ago! I love seeing the town progress and the mini games. Hopefully there’s more to come.

Sizzles in profundity. Mesmerizing. Spectacular. Nect level. Very compelling.

I must have missed the free Christmas update. That was the one I really wanted. Hopefully I can still get this much cherished item one day.
I was in the game and it makes you create virtual walls to make it work doesn’t it use the actual walls?

developer_response.body:
Dear,

You need to use the room scan functionality of Meta, after you scanned your room well it will start using your actual walls.

So make sure you do a proper room setup with enough lighting before you start playing the game.

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_title: Cute game with a unique idea in MR mode
reviews.review_description: Loving it so far, you should try it out. I noticed it released on pcvr recently but I think it's better in mixed reality mode due to building things in your own environment.

Pros:  Graphics are bright, cheery, and nicely detailed.  The buildings are flush to my walls and look real.  

Cons: Game is glitchy.  The butterflies disappeared.  I started over with a new game and they disappeared again at a different point in the game.  I have no idea how to get them back.  They're my favorite part of the experience.  Today the game didn't recognize my hand controllers.  I kept getting a message to pick up my controllers.  I had to restart the game three times before it finally worked.  I had just put new batteries in the controllers and they work fine with other games so the problem isn't with them.  

Overall, the game is fun & I don't regret the purchase.  I do hope the glitches are fixed.  I want my butterflies back without having to start a new game.

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

Thanks for the feedback.

Concerning the butterflies they dissapear after some time but you can get them back if you play the mini games in the park building later on. So it is intended behaviour that after some time they dissapear, this is mostly to save on memory cost for the headset.

The controller message is quite weird that it keeps popping up wrongly, can you also make an ingame bug rapport of that as it will give us some more insight as to what might go wrong there.

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_description: I purchased this game last week, and I am 74 years old. I have mobility issues and figured out how to create the town sitting down without having to stand up.  I play it every day and love it every day 💛

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the kind words!

reviews.review_description:
This is really an amazing game, building a town on your walls with tiny people living in it. The animations of the tiny people are just incredible. I love the designs of the buildings and how they grow with each upgrade. I wish I could live in this town myself sometimes. The only downside I have is that when the buildings grow larger by each upgrade, they sometimes get too big and grow into each other if they are placed to close. 
There seems to be an option to relocate your building, but when I try to do it, it doesn't want to put the buildings down on its new location. It just stays in the see-through state of its base model, and you can't put it down. So basically, I can't relocate my buildings as it is right now, and if buildings get too large, they might grow into each other if they are placed too close to each other. I hope that this can be fixed in an update, but other than that, this game is just amazing, and this minor bug might not be a reason not to buy it. This is what MR is made for, it's a must play if you like or are interested in MR.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the kind words.

We have released a patch yesterday that should resolve not being able to move your buildings, please let us know if this issue is resolved.

If not hop on our Discord or file a bug repport in game so we can help you further along.

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_description:
I bought my Quest 3s specifically for three games. Batman, Shattered and this absolute Gem of a game. I'm a 53 year old who has played games most of my life. I'm not a keen farming, building, or Sims type games type of guy, but this beauty of a game had me hooked. The developers have truly proven that.
 A: You're a very talented team.
B: Customer after care is excellent.
C: VR is not just for nausea inducing games or poorly designed visual games that only bleed your wallet.
Graphics are jaw-dropping. Mini games are fun. Animations are fantastic. Chefs Kiss of a game.
I hope there will be an additional DLC. I'd love to see something like hand gliding or maybe more exploration, like mining on the moon or swimming through unexplored caverns. This game deffinatley gives me Jules Verne vibes .
Well-done again, and thank you.


P.S: What does the alchemist actually do?

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the kind words!

For now the alchemist is the hiding place of the Ninja, it does not serve a direct purpose yet, but in future patches we might expand on that.

reviews.review_description:
l love & enjoy playing Wall town wonder VR Game very much.l watch your christmas special version trailer , look interesting.Can l  buy this DLC?Please tell me where  l  can download it? 
Thanks.

Great game, not much on how To's online, but other people's actions with the game. I see or should say I am learning I find that certain layouts allow for buildings to connect by bridges, which is cool but didn't know until this week, I am pretty sure this game is almost endless, the themes I have yet to uncover on the main menu that I can only change themes with each person, building and item, but the main theme brush on the page I cannot figure out. Also town layout does anyone know the extent of the towns layout or how big it can get? It adds people here and there either walking on the floor or coming in on a balloon. Great game and do agree it does get redundant sometimes, playing the games thinking this would move you faster or further with it, I do not know. Read it somewhere it can reach 100 houses or buildings....

developer_response.body:
Hi Kosmo,

Thanks for the kind words.

We are continously adding more features and content in the future.

The theme brush is made for seasonal events like the christma them and is currently not active but might be in the future when we release complete themes that you can always activate.

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_description: It's beautiful, please add more content.

I am really enjoying this game it looks great and is interesting to watch. definitely lose track of time just watching the villagers go about their day. I could see it being a game I come back to over and over just to visit the town.

I hope it will continue to be updated I would like to see some more RTS style gameplay mechanics added that are not based on minigames. It would also be cool if the blimp/balloon/airplane flew around on their own randomly without user interaction. Day night cycles based on real world time would also be interesting.

I find that some of buildinga you unlock later don’t have much villager activity. The valentines date dialog is also too easy to accidentally click.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the kind words!

reviews.review_title: Loads of Detail, Style, and XR fun
reviews.review_description:
I love this game, it's great example of how to implement AR/MR - especially on the MQ3. The fact you will venture off into your own home looking for mushrooms with a lizard being ridden by a steampunk style character that talks to you is worth the admission price. 

My dogs seem to like that I'm moving around and join the fun with me. They don't know what I'm looking at, but they are very interested! 5 stars from me and my dogs.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the kind words!

Also say thanks for the support from the dogo's <3

reviews.review_description: It's really very nice game, beautiful graphic and animation.

.This is incredible!!

Love the idea behind it, the animations, the graphics, music!!

You play as a friendly giant helping small people build a town and thrive in it.

You place various buildings around your room, onto the walls. The little people go about their day and jobs, going from building to building.

Love the butterflies flying around… touching them to change colour.
The hot air balloon you can blow around or hit/bump it about.

The details are really nice and sharp on the people , buildings and interiors.

The game reminds me a little of The Sims and also an old game called Little Computer People.

It’s such a joy to play and watch the stories and animations.

I highly recommend this game… it has to be played standing up and in your room space though.

You can even turn on a snow/winter themed … and change the decoration on the buildings and aircraft ect…

Can’t wait to get back to this… it’s great!!!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the kind words!

reviews.review_description: GOAT

I just got the game and it is so fun. I really enjoy looking at the miniature town and see everything happening.seeing the plane fly and the bugs coming out of the walls is great. Young and old will have fun with this game.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the kind words, glad you are enjoying yourself!

reviews.review_description:
Well if you ever wanted a game experience like no other this definitely is it.
What an absolutely incredible idea.
You really have to experience it to believe how awesome this is.
You are sucked in from the off.
It’s just so cute and engaging, you meet your first character and build your first house  and your journey starts
The graphics of the houses and people are just on another level and sharp.
It’s like watching a mini movie on your quest.
Simply stunning.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the kind words!

reviews.review_description:
Just purchased this today, I have only scratched the surface, but loving my experience so far.

Highly recommend

developer_response.body: Thanks so muych for the kind words!

reviews.review_description: Game won't work,mapped my room and even though room virtually empty keeps asking to scan a valid room,waste of money

developer_response.body:
Hi Kipper, sorry to hear you are exepriencing issues with the room scan, sadly sometimes the room scan in meta can go corrupt, the only way to solve this is by deleting all your previous scanned rooms and you can do it by following this guide:  https://www.meta.com/help/quest/625635239532590/

This is sadly completely out of our hands as a developer, so hopefully you find the time to clear out the rooms and rescan your room and give our game a try.

If you keep experiencing issues feel free to reach out to us again or join our Discord here for more help: https://discord.gg/wYmnPV4vjq

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_description: Fantastic game that really shows what mixed reality can do. Tiny people walking and flying around your room and of course in your walls.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the kind words! <3

reviews.review_description: Wow! This the best mix reality game I own. This game will wow you as you help out the tiny neighbors with different talents and wonderful personality's. Building, gardening, dining, clothing, fishing 🎣, swimming, air transport, lizard riding, mining, bug exterminator. I Love this game. #1 go to after a days work.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the kind words! <3

reviews.review_description:
I like the game, its fun, but too many times it wants to restart the game from scratch.
It usually says found a new room, even when it is not,  and when I try to load a game from backup nothing happens.
I had fun but have now given up.

developer_response.body:
Hi Doug,

Sorry to hear that the saves were not correctly loading. We did hear some people who had issues with saves regestering on the device they had a better time ater reinstalling the game.

We are monitoring all these issues and we hope to make things more stable in the near future.

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_title: “The Borrowers” come to life in my home
reviews.review_description:
Wow! This game is pure VR magic! It feels like I’m watching “The Borrowers” come to life in my own home.  

It’s truly a wonder to see all the buildings grow out of your walls. The little people are delightfully animated and brimming with character. This is a super cozy, relaxing, light management game with mini-games to help overcome resource bottlenecks. The mini-games make excellent use of augmented reality in clever and engaging ways.  

If you ever get stuck, you can check the main menu for guidance on what to do next.  

Be sure to try all the mini-games to improve resource collection!  

The only thing I’d suggest adding is voice narration, though I understand it could be expensive for the developers and would increase the game’s overall size.  

Add this to your wishlist, gift it to friends, and spread the word—it’s wonderful! Long may the talented developers continue to work on it!  

HoverBoardKid

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the kind words!

reviews.review_title: Wish I had more wall space lol
reviews.review_description: I agree with another reviewer, my room seems so boring when I take my head set off. One thing I would like is if we could use other things like cupboards or furniture to build on as I’m running out of wall space that I can reach. I’m really enjoying this game .

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the kind words!

We will keep imrpoving on how you can place buildings in the future, we already got a few islands that can be placed on top of an island perhaps we expand more in that direction.

reviews.review_description:
If you have a big house with a lot of space, this game may work .
Otherwise If like me you have furnitures around, this game never will works.
Gutted, money in the bin😒

developer_response.body:
Hi Not for flat.
Unfortunately as the game is an MR game, and we are making use of your walls and floor, there is a minimum off open space you need to have to play it.
We tried to make that clear in all the teasers and trailers.
Have you tried all the rooms of your house? Have you tried a hallway?
Or you can visit someone who has a little more space and play it there?
If the weather is good enough, you can even play outside as long there are 2 walls.

reviews.review_description: Great game,incredible.But little bug, someone calling to my phone so i put quest from head, after phone was done i put quest on head,the intire position of houses has changed 90 degrees,so houses are now out of sight and actually behind my big oled tv....One solution is quit the game and start again, after start was the position ok like nothing happen.I have photo from this situation when someone has interess to send it

developer_response.body:
Hi Thanks, for the report.

We will investigate this issue.

reviews.review_description: I'm debating if I'm going to refund this game, or hold out in hope that the developers get it together.   I've been waiting for this game, now it's here but it's one big glitch after another.  Can't even get past the first search.  She finds the butterflies and then after ...she just starts looking and looking and looking and looking and looking and looking until you start to think you're in a virtual episode of Unsolved Mysteries. Then suddenly she disappears. and guess what there's no button to spawn her back? The only option is to shut down the game.  Movements glitchy, the figure disappears,  the figure tries to go to spaces that my spatial data should be telling them it isn't a space.  Shows an image of my controller a foot away from my hand.  Figure drops below my spatial space.  No adjustments for the gravity/ jump/ bounce which just seems to go anywhere.   If it were working correctly it looks like it'd be a very fun and enjoyable game the very little bit I've seen of the graphics look great.  But the mechanics need some serious work.  I'm questioning if they were tested before release.   As far as I can tell I got the up-to-date version with the patch, and the problems I read from other people before the patch are still there.

developer_response.body:
Hi There,

Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback. We’re truly sorry to hear about the issues you’ve been experiencing, and we completely understand how frustrating this must be. Your input is incredibly valuable to us as we continue improving the game.

Regarding the Archaeologist, after finding the butterflies, she needs to be picked up again to continue searching. She should then easily locate the next spot. If this isn’t happening, it might be linked to room scan data. Accurate room scanning is crucial for smooth gameplay, as it ensures the characters and interactions behave correctly. However, we understand that scanned mesh data can sometimes be noisy or imperfect, which is why setting up your room and furniture carefully is also important.

We’d love to assist you directly and troubleshoot these issues with you. Please join us on Discord at https://discord.gg/wYmnPV4vjq, where our team is available to help resolve any problems in real time.

We’re committed to making Wall Town Wonders the best possible experience for everyone and are continuously working on improvements. We truly hope you’ll stick with us as we address these concerns. The feedback from players like you helps us refine the game and ensure it reaches its full potential.

Thank you again for your patience and for giving the game a chance. We hope to see you on Discord soon!

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_description:
You know?... 
Every once in a while someone creates something fantastic, something incredible, something wonderful...
 This is one of those cases...
 A game totally taken from a fantasy world that sneaks into your home..
 It is so beautiful that no matter how much I try to tell you in nice words how incredible it is... I wouldn't be able to do it...
 Thank you thank you and thank you a thousand times for bringing magic to my home...
 Merry Christmas everyone...

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for hte kind words!

reviews.review_description:
What a wondrous and wholesome game. So chill to play around and see the living vivid town and its inhabitants, in all its glory and awesome details. Very nicely done. Some mini games are a bit tedious though.
And I'm now at a point, after a couple of hours gameplay, where I'm not sure if this was it, quests wise..
Quincy said something about a festivity coming up, and now he keeps asking for me. Yet when I talk to him he says he sees that I'm busy, and I have to come back when I'm not anymore.. been doing stuff, and been upgrading. And the quest menu keeps updating to some standard random stuff I can do. So was this it for quest stuff to do?

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the kind words!

We are currently working on a fix where our major gets into an infinite loop rather then completing the next quest. Stay tuned for more!

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_title: Very good games but HELP REQUESTED
reviews.review_description: Great games and nice instructions at the very beginning. Unfortunately I got lost after 1h game time and probably need help now. I saved and quit the game after I landed the plane successfully. Now I try to resume my game but the plane shows up again. After I landed it I got no notification pump out and no more available actions and the task of landing the plane is still in my task list. So I am stuck here ….. sad….

developer_response.body:
Hi Xuadj,

Sorry to hear you are having issues with the game, could you be so kind and report a bug report via the in game menu already so we can try to find out whats wrong?

Feel free to join our Discord for live support: https://discord.gg/wYmnPV4vjq

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_description:
The game is really enjoyable, like playing the sims but in vr. Graphics are very realistic. Got the festive scene and it's snowing in my room.
Hope there are updates to the game. Was dissappointed that there were only 6 levels.
Well done to the devs.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words, we are continously updating the game and bringing more new things and mechanics as time goes on.

reviews.review_description: I think the game is like, oh we need that, build that. Oh I need to go over there, pick me up.

developer_response.body:
Hi Jeppe,

Thanks for the feedback, this is mostly in the introduction, once you pass that point you can freely build and choose which mini games to play.

The intro duction is mainly intended for people to learn the game.

We hope you can give the game a bit longer shot and see if you like the later parts as wel. :)

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_description: My aunt that never used VR before would be amazed. I could last 20 minutes before felt asleep. Its cute, looks good, works fine but in general its boring experience

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your thoughts! The game was designed with a focus on creating a calming and immersive experience, rather than action-packed intensity. Our goal is to provide a space where players can unwind, relax, and immerse themselves in a charming, stress-free world. It’s wonderful to hear that your aunt might enjoy it—it’s exactly the kind of reaction we hope to inspire in those exploring VR for the first time. We understand it might not be for everyone, but we truly appreciate your feedback and hope you’ll find moments of joy in the experience. 😊

reviews.review_description: This is definitely my favourite game now! You can inside their little houses! I love being able to choose where each place goes. It’s also cute and tiny. I love it!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the kind words!

reviews.review_title: Bring life to your living room!
reviews.review_description:
A really charming mixed reality experience, super chill and some really unique interactions with the room scan.

Early on in my first playthrough the town mayor was "buried underground" on my desk under my laptop's keyboard, which was super fun. 

Filling up walls with parts of the town is super interesting, and I can imagine a time with a Quest 4/5/+ having a game like this running all the time while you're doing work could be.. kinda mesmorizing.

As a PSA to parents with Quests - reading-aged kids are going to LOVE this!

Looking forward to see how the game progresses over the coming months 🙌

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the kind words!

We will keep updating the game and very soon our first content Christmas update will land, which includes new mini games and a Christmas themed quest line!

reviews.review_title: Can't even start the game. It's garbage.
reviews.review_description:
Please choose a valid room or rescan? Yes. Please choose a valid room or rescan? Yes. Please choose a valid room or rescan? Yes. Please choose a valid room or rescan...

You get the idea.

developer_response.body:
Dear El1ous,

Sorry to hear you are experiencing issues with setting up your room.

There is currently a bug in the Meta Scanning SDK which invalidates any room you will currently scan. The only fix here is to delete all your scanned data which you can find how to do here: https://www.meta.com/help/quest/articles/accounts/privacy-information-and-settings/spatial-data-settings/

If something is not clear please hop onto our Discord and we will try our best to get you up and going: https://discord.gg/wYmnPV4vjq

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_description:
Just so impressive and beautiful MR game! I don’t know even what else to add. It’s just must have in everyone’s collection! 

Awesome job team!🔥☕️👍👍

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the kind words!

reviews.review_description: It starts sideways and everything you do you have to restart the game and buttons don’t  work no I just tried what you said but it still sideways and then if you play it that way you don’t get far at all and everything disappears and nothing happens after that it’s a waste of money

developer_response.body:
*** UPDATE:

Hi Jazzy, we just submited patch 1.01 and this resolved your issue that you described, we would love it if you gave it another try and let us know if you can now correctly play the game.

**** 
Hi Jazzy,

If your game is sideways it means something went wrong with scanning your room.

Please delete all your scanned rooms in the Meta menu, then rescan your room, make sure you have enough light around you so that the scan is as good as possible.

You can check out this tutorial about the room scan setup: https://discord.com/channels/1262774627818803321/1309546788708946020/1309948613954240563

If you are still having issues come over to our Discord and we will make sure to help you out: https://discord.gg/wYmnPV4vjq

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_description: Preorder and was looking forward to it. After downloading nothing happens except info to go back into room although I've my whole apartment scanned properly....

developer_response.body:
**** UPDATE:

Dear Skatty,

We just launched patch 1.01 which has better room recovery and should enable you to rescan your room more easly, please give this update a try and hopefullly this resolves your issues. If not please hop onto our Discord so we can assists you more directly:  https://discord.gg/wYmnPV4vjq


Hi Skatty,

Sounds like Meta has problems finding your correct room please delete all your scanned rooms in the meta menu and rescan the current room you want to play in.

If that does not help hop on our discord so we can try to help you out as fast as possible!

Kind regards,

Koen
